text:
$ sysctl kern.eventtimer
kern.eventtimer.periodic: 0
kern.eventtimer.timer: LAPIC
kern.eventtimer.idletick: 0
kern.eventtimer.singlemul: 2
kern.eventtimer.choice: LAPIC(100) i8254(100) RTC(0)
kern.eventtimer.et.RTC.quality: 0
kern.eventtimer.et.RTC.frequency: 32768
kern.eventtimer.et.RTC.flags: 17
kern.eventtimer.et.i8254.quality: 100
kern.eventtimer.et.i8254.frequency: 1193182
kern.eventtimer.et.i8254.flags: 1
kern.eventtimer.et.LAPIC.quality: 100
kern.eventtimer.et.LAPIC.frequency: 100340516
kern.eventtimer.et.LAPIC.flags: 15
$ sysctl kern.timecounter.alloweddeviation
kern.timecounter.alloweddeviation: 5

I have a hope that I can deal with the video. but I don't hear the characteristic "feedback" sound of the microphone and speaker when I do "dd". I thought it was a problem.
